duration_policy: CLI-supported integer duration; seedance2.0_vip image2video supports 4-15s
command_contract_reference: sources/Dreamina_CLI执行契约_V1.2_命令预检与网页CLI差异补丁.md
prompt:
使用锁定关键帧作为唯一首帧。保持雨中古寺主殿正面中轴、湿石板庭院、焚狩在左、霜玑在右、两人中央拳掌/手臂接触点和半写实3D武侠电影气氛不变。

这是一个 4 秒 CLI 合法动作前戏素材，最终剪辑只取其中 0.4–0.8 秒。画面不是大冲击波爆发，而是大冲击波爆发前一瞬间的压力积蓄。两人拳掌/手臂相交，动作短暂停住，接触点周围的雨丝、水珠和雨雾开始异常聚集，像空气被压紧。

第一秒：两人保持当前接触姿态，身体短暂停住，形成强烈 hit-stop。雨正常下落，但接触点附近的几条雨丝开始轻微弯曲，水珠在两人手臂之间短暂停滞。镜头稳定，聚焦中央接触点。

第二秒：接触点周围的雨雾变密，细小水珠悬浮在两人手臂之间，衣摆、发丝和盔甲边缘出现轻微向外绷紧的张力。画面有压力正在积蓄的感觉，但不要爆发成完整冲击波。

第三秒：镜头出现一次极轻微压迫感和微震，像力量即将爆开。雨丝围绕中央接触点出现轻微弯曲和停滞，湿石板地面只出现细小涟漪，不要水墙，不要大水花。

第四秒：压力仍然被压住，没有完全释放。两人仍保持接触关系，主殿背景清楚可见，雨水继续下落，画面停在即将爆发前的紧张状态。不要进入大型冲击波展开，不要进入第二次动作。

限制：不要出现完整巨大球形冲击波，不要出现圆形大水幕，不要只做地面水花，不要让水效从脚下爆开。不要现代城市，不要拳头大特写，不要第三人，不要重复角色，不要融合身体，不要多余肢体，不要改变古寺场景，不要改变主殿正面中轴，不要文字水印。
visual_target: contact-point rain-particle build-up and hit-stop pressure before the shockwave; no full shockwave reveal
edit_role: pre-impact pressure insert before TEST_B / CUT03 shockwave reveal

upstream_material.problem_to_solve: CUT03 begins after the shockwave has already formed; V007 should create the short pressure build-up before that reveal.

preservation_requirements: use original locked SHOT-02 first-clash keyframe as the only input image
preserve rainy ancient temple main hall frontal axis
preserve wet stone courtyard, main hall door, stone steps, rain, and reflections
preserve central close-range fist/palm or arm contact point
feet remain planted on wet stone
allowed_motion: brief hit-stop at the contact point
subtle rain-line bending around the central contact point
small suspended droplets between the arms
denser rain mist near the contact point
slight outward tension in robe edges, hair, and armor edges
very light camera pressure or micro-shake
forbidden_motion: no water effect only from feet
no main hall frontal axis change
risk_notes: The model may trigger the large shockwave too early; prompt repeatedly constrains this as pre-impact only.
If the clip is too static, use only the strongest 0.4-0.8s segment as a tension insert.
Water effects must stay around the central contact point and remain small.
allowed_next_action: Only submit after explicit user approval for exactly one Dreamina image2video task after command-contract preflight.
